meaning: vi.扫视,匆匆一看n.一瞥,眼光,匆匆一看
examples: She shot him an angry glance.
She shot him a sideways glance.
Trevor and I exchanged a glance.
But just as he reaches for the keys, I glance out of my window.
At first glance, PeeWee PC's Pivot Tablet Laptop is a formidable rival to the long-standing OLPC XO.
